fly.source: Fly.io pricing (shared-cpu-1x 1GB ~$2.07/mo if always-on; Fly Postgres shared CPU ~$3/mo). Auto-stop reduces actual app compute to ~$0.50/mo at idle; we use the always-on figure here to keep the Fly↔AWS comparison apples-to-apples (both at 100% availability).

aws.source: derived from infra/aws/*.tf + us-west-2 public on-demand pricing, 720 hrs/month

comparison.note: AWS monthly infra is 10.61x the cost of Fly.io ($5.10 Fly vs $54.09 AWS). LLM cost (OpenRouter) is identical on both platforms and excluded from this model.
